creator: jval@vamk.fi
text:
Starting puppetmaster gives these warnings:

/usr/local/etc/rc.d/puppetmaster: WARNING: $command_interpreter /usr/local/bin/ruby18 != /usr/local/bin/ruby19
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/puppetmaster: WARNING: $command_interpreter /usr/local/bin/ruby18 != /usr/local/bin/ruby19

Fix: 

Update the /usr/local/etc/rc.d/puppetmaster script.

The reason I'm reporting this is that I've changed ruby18 to ruby19 multiple times already but every puppet update changes it back.
How-To-Repeat: service puppetmaster start/restart
